title: Angel
overview: Three girls from all different walks of life are brought together by their shared love for Reika's music.

title: Destiny
overview: Akari, Yuki, and Nozomi do their best to get accepted into Akiba Music School, Father Samuel expresses his concerns about Akari.

title: Class S
overview: Yuki decides to join a street band. Meanwhile, Akari struggles with her nerves as Kisaragi starts observing classes, in search for students to join her S Class.

title: Fortissimo
overview: S Class must face new hardships as they prepare for their debut. Yuki starts to make a name for herself with her newfound band.

title: Love Song
overview: Feeling refreshed, Akari talks to the S Class about much needed improvements. A new student joins the S Class. Could this mean trouble for the other girls?

title: Memory
overview: Akari is trying to put together the pieces of her past as she encounters a similar blue stone. Samuel then reveals her past to her.

title: Resonance
overview: Akari makes her fateful return to the S Class, but she still feels isolated and alone. Yuki comes up with a plan to cheer everyone up.

title: Audition
overview: The trio prepares for the M & K Records' Rookie Audition. The girls quickly realize that Jun is no longer their only rival.

title: Blindly
overview: After the results have been announced, the trio now prepares for their next challenge. But does one of them push herself too far?

title: Advance
overview: R3's first TV performance brings about the pressure of their debut. Meanwhile, Reika is haunted by memories of the past

title: Past
overview: Kisaragi has an exclusive interview, during which memories of her past and youth flash through her mind.

title: Beginning
overview: Even as rookies, R3 is destined for greatness as they are nominated for a Music Police Award, but is the publicity too much for the girls to handle?

title: Angels
overview: The day of the Music Police Awards has finally arrived. R3 must face up against their longtime idol Reika in their rise to fame.
